summary: Spain 四球大胜 Saudi Arabia 提前出线，Belgium 与 Iran 互交白卷后 Group G 继续胶着，Uruguay 伤停补时逃过点球判罚后 2-2 战平 Cape Verde。

highlights: Dani Olmo 第 15 分钟首开纪录，Spain 上半场两球领先并牢牢控制比赛
Nico Williams 第 57 分钟扩大优势，Oihan Sancet 第 88 分钟把比分定格为 4-0
Spain 两战全胜提前锁定淘汰赛席位，Saudi Arabia 两连败后提前出局
highlights_zh: Dani Olmo 第 15 分钟首开纪录，西班牙上半场两球领先并牢牢控制比赛
Nico Williams 第 57 分钟扩大优势，Oihan Sancet 第 88 分钟把比分定格为 4-0
西班牙两战全胜提前锁定淘汰赛席位，沙特阿拉伯两连败后提前出局
highlights_en: Dani Olmo opened the scoring in the 15th minute as Spain controlled the first half and led by two at the break
Nico Williams extended the lead in the 57th minute before Oihan Sancet sealed the 4-0 win in the 88th
Spain qualified for the knockout stage with two wins from two, while Saudi Arabia were eliminated after back-to-back defeats

highlights: Belgium 与 Iran 全场未能破门，Group G 前三场全部以平局收场
Nathan Ngoy 第 84 分钟被红牌罚下，Belgium 最后阶段少打一人仍守住 0-0
Iran 连续两场战平后积 2 分，末轮仍保有主动冲击淘汰赛的机会
highlights_zh: 比利时与伊朗全场未能破门，G 组前三场全部以平局收场
Nathan Ngoy 第 84 分钟被红牌罚下，比利时最后阶段少打一人仍守住 0-0
伊朗连续两场战平后积 2 分，末轮仍保有主动冲击淘汰赛的机会
highlights_en: Belgium and Iran failed to score, leaving the first three Group G matches all drawn
Nathan Ngoy was sent off in the 84th minute, but Belgium held on for a 0-0 draw with ten men
Iran moved to two points after a second straight draw and still control a path toward the knockout stage

highlights: Kevin Pina 第 21 分钟远射破门，Cape Verde 取得队史世界杯首球
Ronald Araújo 与 Guillermo Varela 两度为 Uruguay 扳平比分，Duk 在上半场补时也有进球
补时阶段 Cape Verde 获得点球后又被 VAR 取消，双方最终 2-2 战平
highlights_zh: Kevin Pina 第 21 分钟远射破门，佛得角取得队史世界杯首球
Ronald Araújo 与 Guillermo Varela 两度为乌拉圭扳平比分，Duk 在上半场补时也有进球
补时阶段佛得角获得点球后又被 VAR 取消，双方最终 2-2 战平
highlights_en: Kevin Pina scored from distance in the 21st minute to give Cape Verde their first World Cup goal
Ronald Araujo and Guillermo Varela twice equalized for Uruguay, while Duk also scored in first-half stoppage time
Cape Verde had a stoppage-time penalty overturned by VAR as the match finished 2-2

standings_changes: Group H：Spain 两战 6 分提前晋级；Uruguay 积 2 分暂列第二，Cape Verde 积 1 分保留出线希望，Saudi Arabia 两连败后提前出局。
Group G：Belgium 与 Iran 各积 2 分，New Zealand 与 Egypt 在本轮交手前各积 1 分，小组前三场全部战平。
Cape Verde 2-2 战平 Uruguay 后拿到队史世界杯首个积分，末轮仍有机会竞争小组第二或成绩较好的第三名。

news.title: Spain 4-0 Saudi Arabia: la Roja romp into knockout rounds
news.title_zh: 西班牙 4-0 沙特阿拉伯：斗牛士军团大胜晋级淘汰赛
news.title_en: Spain 4-0 Saudi Arabia: La Roja romp into knockout rounds

news.title: Belgium 0-0 Iran: Red Devils held in third straight Group G draw
news.title_zh: 比利时 0-0 伊朗：欧洲红魔在 G 组第三场平局中被逼平
news.title_en: Belgium 0-0 Iran: Red Devils held in third straight Group G draw

news.title: Uruguay 2-2 Cape Verde: VAR reprieve denies late islanders chance
news.title_zh: 乌拉圭 2-2 佛得角：VAR 取消补时点球，双方握手言和
news.title_en: Uruguay 2-2 Cape Verde: VAR reprieve denies late islanders chance

news.title: New Zealand v Egypt live: Group G remains unresolved as final fixture kicks off
news.title_zh: 新西兰对埃及直播：G 组悬念随着最后一场开球继续保留
news.title_en: New Zealand v Egypt live: Group G remains unresolved as final fixture kicks off

summary_zh: 西班牙 4-0 大胜沙特阿拉伯提前出线，比利时与伊朗互交白卷后 G 组继续胶着，乌拉圭 2-2 战平佛得角。
summary_en: Spain beat Saudi Arabia 4-0 to qualify early, Belgium and Iran drew 0-0 to keep Group G tight, and Uruguay drew 2-2 with Cape Verde.
standings_changes_zh: H 组：西班牙两战 6 分提前晋级；乌拉圭积 2 分暂列第二，佛得角积 1 分保留出线希望，沙特阿拉伯两连败后提前出局。
G 组：比利时与伊朗各积 2 分，新西兰与埃及在本轮交手前各积 1 分，小组前三场全部战平。
佛得角 2-2 战平乌拉圭后拿到队史世界杯首个积分，末轮仍有机会竞争小组第二或成绩较好的第三名。
standings_changes_en: Group H: Spain advanced early with six points from two matches; Uruguay sit second on two points, Cape Verde have one point, and Saudi Arabia are out after two defeats.
Group G: Belgium and Iran have two points each, while New Zealand and Egypt had one point each before their meeting; the first three group matches all ended level.
Cape Verde earned their first World Cup point with the 2-2 draw against Uruguay and still have a path to second place or a best-third-place spot.
